site.title: Astronaunt Starter
site.description: A fast Astro starter with Vue islands, Tailwind, Biome, REST helpers, JWT-ready auth utilities, i18n, and lightweight Motion animations.

home.metaTitle: Astronaunt Starter — Astro, Vue, REST, i18n
home.title: Build fast multilingual Astro apps
home.subtitleMiddle: with JWT-ready auth helpers, i18n, Biome quality checks, and

cards.title: Astro foundation
cards.body: Static-first pages, small client JavaScript, and fast builds.

cards.title: Biome quality
cards.body: One tool for linting, formatting, import sorting, and CI checks.

cards.title: Motion ready
cards.body: Lightweight animations for page reveals and micro-interactions.

cards.title: REST first
cards.body: Typed fetch client for JSON APIs; no GraphQL dependency or setup.

animationCards.title: Tiny runtime
animationCards.body: Motion loads only on this island.

animationCards.title: Fast UI
animationCards.body: Great for page transitions and micro-interactions.
